meta.title: Contact — The Clinics of Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
meta.description: Addresses, phone numbers and directions for the four clinics of Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko in Rehovot, Bnei Ayish and Rishon LeZion — plus a contact form for any other question.

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.subtitle: All addresses, phone numbers and directions for the four clinics — and for anything else, we are glad to hear from you through the form.

urgent.heading: Urgent questions
urgent.text: The website form is not intended for urgent matters. In a medical emergency, call 101 (Magen David Adom) or go to the nearest emergency room immediately. For an urgent question about an existing appointment — call the clinic directly.
